business.title: Multibagger MTAR Technologies shares drop nearly 4% despite 223% surge in Q4 net profit

Healthy corporate balance sheets and stable earnings trends underpin this confidence.

business.title: MSCI rejig: MCX, Indian Bank included, but RVNL, Kalyan Jewellers out

The changes will take effect after market close on May 29. MSCI also carried out a major clean-up in the Small Cap index, where more than a dozen Indian stocks are set to exit.

business.title: US Stock Market: Fed’s Goolsbee flags rising inflation risks after weak April data
business.summary: Chicago Fed President Austan Goolsbee raised concerns over rising U.S. services inflation, saying recent data showed price pressures moving in an unfavourable direction. He noted inflation remains sticky despite a stable labour market, reinforcing caution among policymakers as the Federal Reserve continues to assess its rate path amid mixed economic signals.

business.title: Global Market: OECD sees Bank of Japan raising rates to 2% by 2027 amid inflation shift
business.summary: Japan's central bank might increase interest rates to two percent by late 2027. This move signals confidence in Japan's economy moving past decades of low inflation. Stronger wages and consumer demand allow for gradual borrowing cost hikes. The Bank of Japan is also expected to reduce bond purchases. This shift marks a significant economic transition for the nation.
